name: clojure
description: Use the Clojure tools to run Clojure programs on the JVM, start a REPL, or invoke a specific function with data

options.description: Use concatenated aliases to modify classpath
Invoke tool by name or via aliases ala -X
Use concatenated aliases to modify classpath or supply main opts
Prepare deps - download libs, cache classpath, but don't exec
Pass opt through in java_opts
Pass the deps data on the command line
Compute classpath and echo to stdout only
Use specified classpath instead of cached or computed one
Print environment and command parsing information as data
Ignore classpath cache and force recomputation
Generate (or update) pom.xml with deps and paths
Ignore the ~/.clojure/deps.edn config file
Set the number of threads to use when downloading dependencies
Write a trace.edn file that traces deps expansion
Print dependency tree
Print all path locations
Print the Clojure CLI version
Load a file or resource
Evaluate expressions in string; print non-nil values
Report uncaught exceptions
Call the -main function from a namespace with args
Run a REPL
Show help for clojure
